doc_title_en: Response to Capital Cost and Share Price Consciousness Management (Update) – May 14, 2026

key_facts.reason_jp: 資本コストや株価を意識した経営の実現

summary_en: Specific metrics and targets not disclosed in first two pages. Board resolution on 2026/5/14 to evaluate and improve capital-cost-conscious management framework; details in attached materials.
summary_jp: 具体的な指標・目標値は最初の2ページでは未開示。2026年5月14日の取締役会決議で資本コスト・株価意識経営の改善方針を決定；詳細は添付資料参照。
tag_en: COC Update – Capital cost & share price consciousness management – 2026/5/14
